title: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Gartner positioned it as a Leader in the 2025 Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services for the third consecutive year. The recognition relates to Infosys’ public cloud transformation capabilities and references Infosys Cobalt’s role in enterprise cloud journeys, automation, AIOps-driven resiliency, and zero-touch operations.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services.
This was the third consecutive year Infosys received this Leader positioning in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services.
Infosys Cobalt is described as supporting enterprise cloud journeys with focus on zero-touch operations, automated healing, and AIOps-driven resiliency.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in nextgeneration digital services and consulting, today announced that it has been positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services (PCITS), for the third year in a row.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main recognition and third-consecutive-year claim.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Cobalt continues to accelerate enterprise cloud journeys with a strong focus on zerotouch operations, automated healing, and AIOps-driven resiliency.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the limited business context around Infosys Cobalt’s cloud transformation capabilities.
